growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

up.method: Table 2, fructose Expt1 csSRR 52-82; Expt2 59-111 fmol/cell/day

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to 8.6 mM (Expt1) / 9.4 mM (Expt2) SumH2S

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Fructose 1,500 (Expt.1) k 0.45 ... csSRR 52-82 ... SumH2S 8.6; (Expt.2) k 0.49 ... csSRR 59-111 ... SumH2S 9.4.
growth_records.notes: Table 2, two replicate experiments combined. Max k~0.49 day-1 -> mu=0.0204 h-1; td=ln2/0.49=1.41 day=34 h. csSRR 52-111 fmol/cell/day. 14 mM fructose, PO4~1500 uM (non-limiting). D. inopinatus is much larger cell than D. fructosovorans (volume ~22 vs 2 um3).

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to 18.4 mM SumH2S (highest of D. inopinatus non-P-limited)

mfa.note: 2 malate + SO4 2- -> 2 acetate + 4 HCO3- + HS- + H+; drG'0.90 = -242.5 kJ/mol

growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Malate 1,500 ... k 0.21 ... csSRR 96-223 ... SumH2S up to 18.4 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 2. Max k=0.21 day-1 -> mu=0.00875 h-1; td=ln2/0.21=3.30 day=79.2 h (slowest-growing substrate but highest per-cell csSRR 96-223). 28 mM malate.

growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Lactate 1,500 ... k up to 0.64 ... csSRR 53-397 ... SumH2S up to 10.7 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 2. Max k=0.64 day-1 -> mu=0.0267 h-1; td=ln2/0.64=1.08 day=26 h. csSRR 53-397 fmol/cell/day (high early-exponential per-cell rate). 28 mM lactate, PO4 non-limiting (~1500 uM).

growth_records.medium: DSMZ #196 medium + lactate, phosphate-limited (150 uM PO4)

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to ~17 mM SumH2S

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Lactate 150 ... k up to 0.34 ... csSRR 111-388 ... SumH2S ~17 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 3, phosphate limitation (150 uM). Max k=0.34 day-1 -> mu=0.0142 h-1; td=ln2/0.34=2.04 day=48.9 h. csSRR 111-388 fmol/cell/day (elevated per-cell rate under P-limitation with larger cells). Same 28 mM lactate medium as non-P-limited but reduced phosphate.

growth_records.medium: DSMZ #196 medium + lactate, phosphate-limited (15 uM PO4)

up.method: Table 3 range 341-577 fmol/cell/day (highest for D. inopinatus)

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to ~17.6 mM SumH2S

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Lactate 15 ... k up to 0.40 ... csSRR 341-577 ... SumH2S ~17.6 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 3, severe phosphate limitation (15 uM). Max k=0.40 day-1 -> mu=0.0167 h-1; td=ln2/0.40=1.73 day=41.6 h. csSRR 341-577 fmol/cell/day - highest per-cell sulfate reduction rate for D. inopinatus, consistent with paper's finding that P-limitation raises apparent csSRR.

growth_records.medium: DSMZ #196 medium + lactate, phosphate-limited (3 uM PO4)

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to ~4.9 mM SumH2S (low - severe P-limitation restricts total growth)

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. inopinatus Lactate 3 ... k up to 0.26 ... csSRR 125-311 ... SumH2S ~4.9 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 3, severe P-limitation (3 uM). Max k=0.26 day-1 -> mu=0.0108 h-1; td=ln2/0.26=2.67 day=64 h. csSRR 125-311 fmol/cell/day but low total sulfide (~4.9 mM) reflecting limited biomass. Cells become very large/elongated under this P-limitation (length up to 23 um).
